title: Cool Camels
description: Camels named "Joe" or "Joe Camel" will have sunglasses and a cigarette, making them much more stylish.
body: This is a simple resourse pack that gives camels sunglasses and a cigarette when named Joe or Joe Camel. In honor of the late Joe Camel of Camel Cigarettes, may he rest in peace. Optifine or Custom Entity Models is required for this to work.
